name: Wild Rice Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup cooked wild rice, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and yeast in a large bowl.
2. Mix in the milk, sugar, and salt until well blended.
3. Add the flour and stir to form a soft dough.
4. Incorporate the butter, wild rice, rolled oats, and wheat berries by hand.
5. Follow the bread machine manufacturer's instructions for additional ingredients and baking settings.
6. Baking will produce a 1-pound loaf.
